title: set the authfile path if XDG_RUNTIME_DIR not set
body:
we will fix kernel keyring in future PRs. This patch will force podman to use previous defaults.

Will use /run/containers/UID/auth.json if XDG_RUNTIME_DIR is not set.

Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon*, *QiWang19* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
open PR https://github.com/containers/image/pull/679 in c/image to disable podman to use kernel keyring, If we use that PR we don't need to get this in, right?
I think the c/image PR does remove the need for this, yes. @mtrmac Agree?
Should we close this now given https://github.com/containers/image/pull/680 has been merged?  Ditto the Buildah variant of this patch (https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/1771)?
I think we abort this and use the c/image version
Closing in favor of c/image 680 - we'll revendor image for the fixes.
